The '''Imperial Transport'''<ref name="Concept" /> was a class of [[transport]] vessel used by the [[Galactic Empire]] on [[Tao]].<ref name="Lop and O" /> It was larger than an [[Imperial Gozanti-class cruiser|Imperial ''Gozanti''-class cruiser]] and a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter]].<ref name="Concept" />
{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|I designed a Transport ship to carry forced laborers to Tao. However, along with the escorting The Gozanti-class cruiser, the scene was cut. There's a scene with a Transport ship and Gozanti-class in the distance. Please try to find them!|IZMOJUKI, on a tweet regarding the transport|<ref name="Twitter">{{Twitter|izmojuki|status/1444348343388307457|出雲重機 / IZMOJUKI 公式|quote=I designed a Transport ship to carry forced laborers to Tao. However, along with the escorting The Gozanti-class cruiser, the scene was cut. There's a scene with a Transport ship and Gozanti-class in the distance. Please try to find them! #StarWarsVisions #LopandOcho|date=2021-10-02|archivedate=20220407191043}}</ref>}}
[[File:Imperial-Transport-Tao-CA.jpg|thumb|right|245px|Asset model of the Imperial Transport]]
The Imperial Transport first appeared in the ''[[Star Wars: Visions]]'' short film, "[[Lop & Ochō]]," which was produced by [[Geno Studio]] and directed by [[Yuki Igarashi]].<ref name="Lop and O" /> [[Junji Okubo|IZMOJUKI]] provided the design of the Imperial Transport, stating that the transport was designed to carry slaves to Tao, but the scene of the ship arriving alongside a ''Gozanti''-class cruiser was not used in the final cut of the short film. The name of the asset is titled "Imperial Army Transport Ship."<ref name="Concept" />
